case_title: CLASSY BRITTON VS. LEGALMATCH.COM, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRITTON, CLASSY AS TO DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH.COM, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRITTON, CLASSY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH.COM, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $993.03 PRINCIPAL, $.74 INTEREST, $115.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,109.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
